criteria.notes: Plain static HTML/CSS site with no React or @amsterdam/design-system-react usage.
Custom CSS only; no --ams-* design tokens or Tailwind bridge used.
No Amsterdam Design System Grid/Column 4/8/12 layout; uses custom CSS layout.
Header and footer are custom HTML elements, not ADS Header/Footer components.
Form uses plain HTML inputs, not ADS form components.
No banned libraries used; only plain HTML/CSS/JS.
All visible text in the screenshot is in Dutch.
Text uses complex vocabulary like 'klimaatadaptieve' and long compound sentences, closer to B2 than B1.
Screenshot shows exactly 5 content paragraphs on the page; grep confirmed 5 per file.
Content discusses real Zuidas topics: Station Zuid densification, sustainability, mixed-use redevelopment.
Consistent professional and informative tone throughout.
Three separate HTML pages (index, projecten, leefomgeving) linked via navigation.
Newsletter form clearly visible with name, email, interest dropdown, consent checkbox, and submit button.
Top navigation bar with Overzicht, Projecten, and Leefomgeving links visible in screenshot.
